[[File:Horizon diagram.svg|thumb|Diagram explaining the Horizon]]
The Horizon is the barrier by which the [[thing beyond itself]] either [[shines]] past or retreats past, separating the [[void]] from your subjective experience.<ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 47 47:00</ref>

== See Also ==

* [[Phenomenal knowing]]

== References ==
[[Category:Phenomenology]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Horizon]][[Category:Phenomenal knowing]]
[[Category:Pages]]
